subject: six-fingered hand count
fact: The crimson hand mark of the demon lord Graz'zt has six fingers.

subject: natural 20 roll
fact: The party achieved a natural 20 on a performance roll to bypass a manhunt.

subject: Spire upper vaults
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is hidden in the upper vaults of the Spire.
source_quote: upper vaults where the Lexicon of Oaths was hidden

subject: Spire upper vaults
fact: The runic key is necessary to reach the upper vaults.
source_quote: runing key necessary to reach the upper vaults

subject: breathing apparatus
fact: The portable hole used to hide the giant is fitted with a breathing apparatus.
source_quote: portable hole fitted with a breathing apparatus

subject: escape from courtyard
fact: The party used the confusion of the moment and magical stealth to begin a quiet retreat.
source_quote: confusion of the moment and magical stealth

subject: advantage on checks
fact: The party is granted advantage on upcoming deception, intimidation, or persuasion checks against Vraxen and Veperyd.
source_quote: granted advantage on upcoming deception, intimidation, or persuasion checks against Vraxen and Veperyd

subject: years ago artifact theft
fact: Felkur accidentally stole a potent divination artifact from Mulmaster years ago.

subject: Felkur's remaining tokens
fact: Felkur had four tokens remaining after using one to cast a sleep spell.
source_quote: Using it left Felkur with four tokens remaining.

subject: Reduction Scrolls used
fact: Two scrolls were used to reduce the fire giant Brandyr by two size categories.
source_quote: Two scrolls were used to reduce her by two size categories.

subject: Reduction size categories
fact: The fire giant Brandyr was reduced by two size categories.
source_quote: Two scrolls were used to reduce her by two size categories.

subject: Divination Artifact sale price
fact: Felkur sold the divination artifact for 45 gold pieces.

subject: Divination Artifact consequence duration
fact: The sale of the artifact triggered years of investigation by Mulmaster's hierarchy.
source_quote: triggering years of investigation by Mulmaster's hierarchy

subject: Reduce spell casts
fact: The Reduce spell was cast twice during the session.

subject: Minor Illusion uses
fact: Minor Illusion was used twice during the session.
